metaTitle: Image Compressor — Reduce Image File Size (Free, Private & No Quality Loss)
metaDescription: Compress JPG, PNG, and WebP images instantly in your browser. No file uploads required. 100% private — your photos never leave your device. Save mobile data and storage for free.

howto.description: Click the upload area or drag and drop your photo (JPG, PNG, WebP). Your image is processed locally and never sent to a server.
Use the slider to set your target file size or quality level. You can see the estimated final size before processing.
Compare the original and compressed images side-by-side to ensure the visual quality meets your needs.
Once satisfied, click 'Save' to download the optimized file directly to your device.

why: 100% private — your sensitive photos and documents never leave your browser
Significant file size reduction while preserving high visual quality
Save mobile data — processing happens on your device without uploading files
Supports all modern formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WebP
Works completely offline after the initial page load
No registration, no daily limits, and no watermarks — 100% free
Perfect for email attachments, web uploads, and saving storage space

faq.q: Is it safe to compress my private photos here?
faq.a: Absolutely. This tool uses client-side compression technology. Unlike other online optimizers, your images are never uploaded to a server, providing total privacy for your personal files.

faq.q: How can I compress an image without losing quality?
faq.a: Our tool uses intelligent algorithms to remove unnecessary metadata and optimize pixel data. For most uses, you can achieve 50-80% size reduction with no visible loss in quality.

faq.q: Will this tool use my mobile data plan?
faq.a: Hardly any! Since the compression happens entirely on your phone or computer, you only use a tiny amount of data to load the initial website. No large files are ever uploaded or downloaded.

faq.q: Is there a limit on file size or number of images?
faq.a: No. There are no file size limits and you can compress as many images as you like. Everything runs within your browser's memory without any restrictions.

faq.q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a: Yes. This tool is fully compatible with all modern mobile browsers, including Safari on iOS and Chrome on Android. It's the perfect quick fix for mobile storage issues.

faq.q: Which format is best for compression?
faq.a: WebP usually offers the best compression-to-quality ratio. If you're starting with a PNG, converting it to WebP can often reduce the size by over 90% while looking identical.
